mechanism_narrative: Declines in the federal funds rate reduce corporate borrowing costs and lower equity discount rates, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.02 over any 3-year rolling window, or positive return frequency drops below 50% during rate cut periods.

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate exceeds 5.0%, labor market slack signals weakening aggregate demand and deteriorating corporate earnings, driving negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Forward returns remain positive in greater than 65% of instances where UNRATE crosses 5.0%, or the t-statistic for return differential is statistically insignificant.

mechanism_narrative: Rising real personal income combined with stable or falling federal funds rates indicates accommodative financial conditions supporting consumer spending, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: The joint signal fails to outperform baseline when RSAFS growth exceeds 2% annually while FEDFUNDS remains flat, with Rank IC below 0.01.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating industrial production growth signals strengthening manufacturing output and supply chain normalization, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next week during recovery phases.
failure_condition: INDPRO acceleration yields negative forward returns in greater than 60% of observations during recovery regimes, or predictive power vanishes after controlling for monetary policy shifts.

mechanism_narrative: Higher real GDP growth reflects robust economic expansion and corporate revenue growth, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Quarterly GDP revisions show no statistical correlation with 60-day forward returns, or Rank IC remains below 0.02 across all market cycles.

mechanism_narrative: Rapid inflation acceleration above 0.5% monthly forces expectations of aggressive monetary tightening, compressing equity valuations and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: S&P 500 returns remain positive in greater than 70% of months where CPIAUCSL rises above 0.5%, or the signal loses predictive power when FEDFUNDS is already above 2.0%.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous growth in total nonfarm payrolls and housing starts indicates synchronized labor market and construction sector expansion, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: The combined signal produces negative forward returns in greater than 55% of observations, or the interaction term loses statistical significance in multivariate regression.

mechanism_narrative: Divergence between slowing industrial production and rising real personal income signals inventory buildup and demand-supply mismatch, driving negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter during late-cycle phases.
failure_condition: Forward returns are positive in greater than 60% of late-cycle observations when INDPRO decelerates while RSAFS accelerates, or the mechanism fails to predict direction after controlling for yield curve inversions.
